hook.summary: A customer arrives at a flower shop and the player instantly grows roses to fulfill the order.
hook.visual_action: Customer approaches counter; player taps a rose bush which grows into a tall pillar.

scene_flow: Customer arrives at the outdoor florist counter.
Player taps a rose bush, causing it to grow instantly into a tall column.
Player harvests the roses and hands them to the customer.
Customer pays with a stack of coins and displays heart icons.
Final splash screen with game title and promotional text.
audience_proxy: Casual female gamers aged 25-50 who enjoy cozy management and gardening simulators.
